title: BHN n8n Executions
description: n8n workflow execution history shipped from SQLite. 5-min cadence; rows by n8n_exec_id ascending.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS executions FROM n8n_execution_stats WHERE started_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS errors FROM n8n_execution_stats WHERE status IN ('error','crashed') AND started_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
SELECT AVG(duration_ms) AS mean_ms FROM n8n_execution_stats WHERE started_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND duration_ms IS NOT NULL
SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, '15m') AS time, workflow_name AS metric, COUNT(*) AS execs FROM n8n_execution_stats WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) GROUP BY 1, workflow_name ORDER BY 1
SELECT started_at, workflow_name, status, duration_ms, LEFT(error_message, 200) AS error FROM n8n_execution_stats WHERE status IN ('error','crashed') ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 100
